agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Mutation of position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific

report.hypothesis: Mutation of position 5 to aromatic residues (W/F/Y) will enhance SSTR2-specific TM5/ECL2 interactions while avoiding off-target SSTR3/5 binding. Mutation of position 6 to acidic residues (E/D) will introduce electrostatic complementarity with SSTR2 ECL3 (284/286) while disrupting off-target electrostatic interactions.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current protocol generates candidates with strong ddG but poor structural qu

report.hypothesis: The current protocol generates candidates with strong ddG but poor structural quality. Tightening structural constraints and increasing stability requirements will improve the overall quality of candidates while maintaining selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: The top candidate has pLDDT=0.0 and dock=0.00, indicating poor structural quality. Lowering the clash threshold will enforce better geometry and reduce clashes in the designed peptides.
The current ddG threshold is too lenient. Tightening it will ensure only the most stable candidates are selected, increasing the likelihood of high-quality designs.
